Package card

package card
Card System and Summoning Framework * This package defines the core infrastructure for the card-based mechanics within the game. It provides an abstract framework for representing various game actions—such as building defenses or casting spells—through a unified card interface. * The system is built upon a hierarchical architecture using the Card base class, which ensures consistency across different card types. By integrating with a functional factory pattern (Supplier), this package enables the dynamic instantiation of game entities, decoupling the card-based user interface from the underlying game world logic. * @author Pun
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Card
    The Card class serves as an abstract blueprint for all playable cards within the game.
    SpellCard
    The SpellCard class is a concrete implementation of the Card template specifically designed for spell-based actions.
    TowerCard
    The TowerCard class is a concrete implementation of the Card template specifically designed for managing and summoning defensive structures.
